working_on.feature: AI Memory Buffer & Interactive Flow Optimization
working_on.task: Hệ thống đã ổn định sau nâng cấp Phase 8

recent_changes.description: Fixed Binance Error -4509: Changed TP/SL for LIMIT entries from closePosition=True to quantity + reduceOnly=True
Fixed ValueError in price parsing: Added safe_extract_price helper to handle AI range strings (e.g. 100-105)
Implemented PIN-based Kill Switch security (default 123456) in .env and Web UI
Implemented AI Memory Lifecycle: 60-min freshness TTL and automatic GC (24h/50-item limit)
Implemented Interactive Shortcut Flow (LLL/SSS) with auto-analysis and trend confluence warnings
Added Persistent AI Memory (ai_memory.json) for cross-symbol analysis caching

errors_encountered.error: ValueError: could not convert string to float: '651.60 - 646.50'
errors_encountered.solution: Created safe_extract_price and tightened AI prompt to forbid ranges

errors_encountered.error: APIError(code=-4509): Time in Force (TIF) GTE can only be used with open positions
errors_encountered.solution: Switched from closePosition=True to quantity + reduceOnly=True for pending LIMIT orders
Increased HTTPXRequest timeouts to 30s in telegram_ctrl.py builder

decisions_made.decision: Use account-wide PIN for kill switch
decisions_made.reason: API Key is too long and inconvenient for mobile/quick access; PIN 123456 is faster
Market conditions change quickly; old TP/SL data from 2 hours ago is dangerous
If AI returns 100-105, 102.5 is a safe representative point for order placement
